page: Amazon Web Services r8ib.16xlarge is a memory-optimized eighth-generation server instance powered by Intel x86_64 processors. It features 64 virtual CPUs mapped to 32 physical cores with 2.0 threads per core, running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance provides dedicated CPU allocation and is managed via the AWS Nitro hypervisor.

The server is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per virtual CPU. It does not include local storage or integrated graphics processing units. For network connectivity, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 67 Gbps. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the r8ib.16xlarge offers high memory density relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation and high baseline network bandwidth support consistent performance. This hardware profile is suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, real-time data analytics, and enterprise resource planning applications.
description: Amazon Web Services r8ib.16xlarge is a memory-optimized eighth-generation server instance featuring 64 dedicated virtual CPUs and 512.0 GB of RAM. Powered by Intel x86_64 processors running at 3.9 GHz, this instance utilizes the AWS Nitro hypervisor to deliver consistent performance. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 67 Gbps but does not include local storage or integrated GPUs. With a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, the r8ib.16xlarge is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, large-scale caching layers, and real-time data processing.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8ib.16xlarge is a memory-optimized server with 64 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 67 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large-scale databases and in-memory applications.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r8ib.16xlarge is an Intel-powered, memory-optimized server featuring 64 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 67 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
tagline: An Intel-powered memory-optimized server featuring sixty-four dedicated virtual CPUs, five hundred twelve gigabytes of RAM, and high-speed baseline networking.

512.0 GB of system memory for memory-intensive applications
